creator: mrspock@esfm.ipn.mx
text:
It seems to me, that FreeBSD tries to make:
		mount -t cd9660 /dev/scd0c /mnt
while system installation process is performed.
It reports that the CD drivers perhaps has an audio CD
even though it has already loaded the kernel.

Fix: 

I think, but I'm not sure, that the mounting device that
has to be used must be:  /dev/scd0a  and not /dev/scd0c.
How-To-Repeat: Get a SONY CD-ROM CDU33A Rev 1.0f.
Try to do a system installation.
